error_signature: no update takes place despite success
title: Supabase update not occurring despite success message
symptom: The update operation appears to succeed in Weweb, but the data in Supabase remains unchanged. Users may be confused as they receive a success response.
applies_when: Update policy for authenticated users is set
not_this_if: Update policy does not include USING expression
root_cause: The issue arises when the UPDATE policy for authenticated users in Supabase does not have a proper USING expression that evaluates to true. This prevents the update from being executed even though the request is sent successfully.
fix_steps: Navigate to the table's RLS policies
Edit the UPDATE policy for authenticated users
Ensure the USING expression evaluates to true
Save the changes and test the update again
agent_instruction: Check and update the USING expression in the Supabase UPDATE policy to ensure it evaluates to true.
